Video.summary: A single thought plants the seed of a narrative. You feel lonely and unsupported, so, of course, someone must have abandoned you. Over time, the thought “I feel abandoned” grows into the story of an entire childhood. Let’s uproot the thought and untangle the story.
Video.title: My Mom Didn't Fight for Me

Image.alt: My Mom Didn't Fight for Me
My Mom Didn't Fight for Me
My Mom Didn't Fight for Me

Video.summary: Fear is a fickle partner. While it certainly serves a purpose — keeping us out of danger and forcing us to question our assumptions — if we give too much of ourselves over to fear, it will lead us down paths filled with insecurity, broken social interactions, and a persistent struggle against the way things actually are.
Video.title: My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner

Image.alt: My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner
My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner
My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner

Video.summary: Definitive statements are comforting. They give life structure and clear direction. But what happens when your declarations are at odds with your subconscious desires?
Video.title: I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With

Image.alt: I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With
I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With
I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With

Video.summary: The focus of today's lecture is this: atonement. While we decided to act a certain way in the past based on our personality, we can now use this information to improve our current and future relationships.
Video.title: Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth

Image.alt: Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth
Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth
Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth

Video.summary: To truly grasp the concept of forgiveness, we have to be willing to see past the person's mistakes. The benefit we get from being more forgiving isn't that other people are going to be more forgiving towards us, it's that it won't affect us when they aren't.
Video.title: Relationships: The Innocence in Everyone

Video.summary: In this lesson, we'll discover the significance of holy relationships. After all, souls are brought together for the purpose of enlightenment.
Video.title: Relationships: Special and Holy Relationships

Video.summary: In the following lesson, we'll discover how the ego mind influences both our way of thinking and our relationships. We'll also identify the unconscious barriers we've built that cause us to form these judgments and thoughts. That's where the problem is, and that's where the solution lies.
Video.title: Relationships: Overcoming the Ego Mind

Video.summary: Today's lesson is a bit of a reality check, as we'll begin to question the current way we look at relationships, romantic or not. How we see ourselves and our relationship to God influences our view of our relationships with other people. Today we're going to examine that view from a place of love.
Video.title: Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey

Image.alt: Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey
Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey
Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey

Video.summary: A miracle happens when you stop thinking with fear and start thinking with love. Your greatest power lies in your mind. To establish stronger connections, you need to go into every situation requesting to be an instrument of love. When you approach your interactions with love, you'll begin to have more miraculous relationships.
Video.title: Relationships: How to Have Miraculous Relationships

Image.alt: Relationships: How to Have Miraculous Relationships
Relationships: How to Have Miraculous Relationships
Relationships: How to Have Miraculous Relationships

Video.summary: Your Day 1 practice offers an invitation to slow down and take stock.
Video.title: Yoga For All Day 1: Notice

Video.summary: Your Day 2 session invites you to use the tools of the at-home yoga practice to befriend your body and your breath. Build on the art of noticing from Day 1 as we expand our vocabulary with a focus on a strong foundation. This session encourages a healthy flow of energy up and down the spine and lovingly guides you to learn how to take responsibility for your experience on the mat.
Video.title: Day 2: Befriend

Video.summary: Your day 3 practice invites you to get to know your body through the structure of the practice and the art of aligning. We build on day 1 and 2 with a focus on action and alignment through asana and energy.
Video.title: Day 3: Align

Video.summary: Your Day 4 practice provides you the opportunity to lean in when you feel discomfort to embrace the process of finding ease. Discover layers of your home practice as we look at our patterns and continue to build a dynamic vocabulary that serves.
Video.title: Day 4: Ease

Video.summary: Gives viewers an inside look at the tremendous scientific effort involved in finding effective treatments for Dementia and Alzheimer's Disease.
Video.title: Research Detectives - Finding Lost Memory

Video.summary: One of the cleverest ways cancer cells survive is by evading detection from the immune system forces that would otherwise destroy them. In this new episode of Research Detectives, we go inside the laboratory with the scientists who are working to outsmart the cancer cells and expose them. Plus, we take a look at medications and treatments that could force the cancer cells to destroy themselves.
Video.title: Research Detectives - Outsmarting Cancer

Video.summary: As humans, we are constantly struggling between the poles of what we think we want and what is. When we lose touch with the truth of what is, we create and compound our suffering. What narratives are you constructing? Are they in conflict with the truth of the situation? Are you struggling with what is?
Video.title: Intro to the Judge-Your-Neighbor Worksheet

Video.summary: The way you recall a memory and the way it actually happened might be completely different. The question is, do you know which version feeds you? We can become so wrapped up in our recollections, we convince ourselves of these untruths. Is that person a monster? Were they wishing you harm? Or were they dealing with a difficult situation in the best way they knew how?
Video.title: My Mother Terrifies Me

Video.summary: Stop focusing on the object of your desires and start focusing on the reason for desiring that object in the first place. When you turn it around, you may find that what you really want is completely different than what you’ve been telling yourself.
Video.title: I Want to Be Famous

Video.summary: In preparation to meet the oldest, pre-Maori tribe of indigenous elders, the Giants call forth the dolphins, then enter the most sacred realm of their entire lives.
Video.title: New Zealand Part 5

Video.summary: Your day 5 practice introduces principles of stability or Sthira. Though this practice we learn to to steady the mind as we strengthen the body. Build on yesterday’s practice to marry effort with ease. Invite your breath to be smooth and even as we continue to build on your foundation.
Video.title: Day 5: Stability

Video.summary: An In-Depth interview with Ali. Talks Nelly, The St. Lunatics, Music Career, and St. Louis
Video.grandparentTitle: Pull Up The Curtain with G Souldier
Video.title: Pull Up The Curtain - Ali of The St. Lunatics

Image.alt: Pull Up The Curtain - Ali of The St. Lunatics
Pull Up The Curtain - Ali of The St. Lunatics
Pull Up The Curtain - Ali of The St. Lunatics

Video.summary: An In-Depth interview with Abe Back. Talks ATL Movie, Def Poetry Jam, Working with Kanye West, and Life
Video.grandparentTitle: Pull Up The Curtain with G Souldier
Video.title: Pull Up The Curtain - Albe Back

Image.alt: Pull Up The Curtain - Albe Back
Pull Up The Curtain - Albe Back
Pull Up The Curtain - Albe Back

Video.summary: An In-Depth interview with James Dumont. Talks Candy Cane Lane, Hollywood Movies, and Legacy
Video.grandparentTitle: Pull Up The Curtain with G Souldier
Video.title: Pull Up The Curtain - James Dumont

Image.alt: Pull Up The Curtain - James Dumont
Pull Up The Curtain - James Dumont
Pull Up The Curtain - James Dumont

Video.summary: John Comack, owner of Green Energy Technology, a company specializing in EV charging stations, seeks funding to expand his business. With a vision for growth and a turnkey solution approach, John impresses the panel with his strategic mindset and grasp of the market.
Video.title: Fund Tank - Green Energy Technology

Video.summary: Dan Notartomaso seeks $650,000 in funding for his companies, Peak Custom Construction and Oak and Iron Design Co. As Dan unveils his unique niche in high-end home remodels catering to professional athletes, the panel of experts delve into his ambitious plans and financial challenges. With rapid growth during the pandemic, Dan grapples with cash flow issues and the need for strategic investment.
Video.title: Fund Tank - Peak Custom Construction

Video.summary: Mother-daughter duo Tosha Wright and Lisa Dunnigan from Teach Your Heart Out seek $600,000 in funding to propel their educational conference business to new heights. With a mission to rejuvenate and empower educators nationwide, they share their inspiring journey and ambitious plans with the panel of experts. Despite facing challenges such as the impact of COVID-19 on educational conferences and the need for strategic expansion, Tosha and Lisa impress with their passion and dedication to their cause.
Video.title: Fund Tank - Teach Your Heart Out

Image.alt: Fund Tank - Teach Your Heart Out
Fund Tank - Teach Your Heart Out
Fund Tank - Teach Your Heart Out

Video.summary: Dr. Don Wood, CEO and founder of the Inspired Performance Institute, seeks funding to scale his groundbreaking trauma resolution program. With a mission to revolutionize mental health treatment, Dr. Wood's program, TIPP, boasts a remarkable 90% success rate in alleviating post-traumatic stress, anxiety, and depression. Rooted in his personal journey to save his daughter from chronic illness, Dr. Wood's method resets the mind's response to trauma, yielding rapid and lasting results in just four hours. Despite financial challenges, Dr. Wood's vision to reach millions drives his pursuit of strategic partnerships and media exposure, highlighting the transformative potential of his innovative approach to healing.
Video.title: Fund Tank - Inspired Performance Institute

Video.summary: La Dolce Vita (Sweet Life) - Ten years after the divorce from Maxwell Turner, with children grown, Celeste Wright Turner makes a choice to start living her life. No SEX with the EX! Simon and Mimi try to get Celeste’s head on straight when it comes to Maxwell’s charm. After facing an emotional challenge, Celeste decides to take a trip abroad.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita

Video.summary: London Bridges Burning Down - Breakdowns are inevitable when Celeste tries to run from her past. Her therapist gives Celeste sound advice on how to spice up her sex life.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down

Video.summary: Butter Me Up - Celeste returns back to Los Angeles after her journey. Her friends throw her a sex toy birthday party. When an old flame comes back, can he melt her butter? Nikki reveals a trauma from her childhood.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up

Video.summary: Pearl Necklace - Can a long-desired gift bring Max and Celeste closer together? While Father Cross’s guilty pleasure is exposed, leaving a young family member seeking revenge and Celeste on his trail. A Fundraiser brings Maddy back to the stage with new comic material on the stage of Denim & Diamonds fundraiser for Autism Care Today.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace

Video.summary: HELP WANTED is the story of an immigrant mechanic stuck in a middle-age malaise who learns to re-appreciate his life through the eyes of a confident new employee.
Video.title: Episode 1
